border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">MDN Web Docs</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+1</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div></div><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">javascript</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> handlePaste = (e) =&gt; {
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Prevent browser from doing its own (different) thing</span><span>
  e.preventDefault();

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// This will be the same regardless of what is focused</span><span>
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> plainText = e.clipboardData.getData(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'text/plain'</span><span>);
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> htmlData = e.clipboardData.getData(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'text/html'</span><span>);

  console.log(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Unified Data:"</span><span>, plainText);
  
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Custom logic to handle the data your way</span><span>
};

</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Apply to everything or specific elements</span><span>
window.addEventListener(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'paste'</span><span>, handlePaste);
document.getElementById(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'myTextarea'</span><span>).addEventListener(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'paste'</span><span>, handlePaste);
document.getElementById(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'myEditableDiv'</span><span>).addEventListener(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'paste'</span><span>, handlePaste);
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">textarea</code><span>&nbsp;</span>or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; You can dynamically inspect the clipboard to see exactly what is available using the<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">e.clipboardData.types</code><span>&nbsp;</span>property.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">types</code><span>&nbsp;</span>property returns an array of all MIME types (like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/plain</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/html</code>, or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">image/png</code>) currently stored in the clipboard. You can loop through this list to decide which one you want to handle:<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">javascript</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>window.addEventListener(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'paste'</span><span>, (e) =&gt; {
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// e.clipboardData.types is an array of available formats</span><span>
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> availableFormats = e.clipboardData.types;
  
  console.log(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Formats in this paste:"</span><span>, availableFormats);

  availableFormats.forEach((</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">type</span><span>) =&gt; {
    </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> data = e.clipboardData.getData(</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">type</span><span>);
    console.log(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">`Content for ${</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">type</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">}:`</span><span>, data);
  });
});
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Key Advantages of This Approach<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Discovery</strong>: You can find "hidden" data formats. For example, copying from Excel or Google Sheets often includes specialized formats like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/rtf</code><span>&nbsp;</span>or custom internal types that you wouldn't know to hardcode.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Prioritization</strong>: You can create a "fallback" system. For example, you can check if<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/html</code><span>&nbsp;</span>exists first, and if not, settle for<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/plain</code>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">File Detection</strong>: If the user pastes a file,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">types</code><span>&nbsp;</span>will often include<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">Files</code>. You can then look at<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">e.clipboardData.items</code><span>&nbsp;</span>to process the actual binary data (like a PNG).</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">types</code></strong>: A read-only array of strings representing the MIME types (e.g.,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/plain</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">text/html</code>) available in the current paste.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">items</code></strong>: A<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">DataTransferItemList</code><span>&nbsp;</span>that gives you low-level access to the data. It is particularly useful for detecting if the paste contains<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">files or images</strong>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">FileList</code><span>&nbsp;</span>containing any files that were copied (like an image file from your desktop).</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">getData(format)</code></strong>: The most common method to retrieve data. You pass a MIME type string (like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">'text/plain'</code>) to get the specific version of the data you want.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">preventDefault()</code></strong>: Prevents the browser from performing its default action (like inserting text into a textarea). This is essential if you want to handle the paste data yourself without it appearing in an input.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">stopPropagation()</code></strong>: Stops the event from bubbling up the DOM tree. This is useful if you have nested paste listeners and only want one to fire.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>window.addEventListener(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'paste'</span><span>, (e) =&gt; {
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> cb = e.clipboardData;

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// 1. List available formats without hardcoding</span><span>
  console.log(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Available types:"</span><span>, cb.types);

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// 2. Access files/images specifically</span><span>
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">if</span><span> (cb.files.length &gt; </span><span style="color: rgb(250, 144, 62);">0</span><span>) {
    console.log(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">"Files detected:"</span><span>, cb.files);
  }

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// 3. Get the content you want</span><span>
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> text = cb.getData(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'text/plain'</span><span>);
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> html = cb.getData(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'text/html'</span><span>);

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// 4. Override default behavior if needed</span><span>
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// e.preventDefault(); </span><span>
});
